runtime_policy: The final artifact should be a fused MLX safetensors model directory. These sources are build-time teachers, verifiers, curricula, and receipt patterns; they are not required runtime wrappers.

sources.name: agent-toolkit
sources.role: Verifier mesh, tool-call discipline, repair gates, and flywheel data generation.

sources.name: agent-brain-blueprint
sources.role: Behavior stance and knowledge lanes for local LLM engineering, verifier-first agents, security, and tool use.

sources.name: glm52-demolition
sources.role: Prior demolition pattern: MLX-native saliency, conservative pruning discipline, requantization, LoRA heal, and receipt-first claims.

sources.name: tinygpt-souls
sources.role: Soul tags, per-soul canons, per-soul verifier patterns, and soul-preserving calibration prompts.

sources.name: glm52-demolition-data
sources.role: Reusable GLM demolition data: LoRA-heal gold, swappable-soul gold, agentic/tool reliability data, and REAP calibration corpora.
goes_into_model_as: Lite SFT curriculum after sampling and schema normalization

sources.name: glm52-verified-fixes
sources.role: Small private execution-verified bug-fix corpus for repair behavior recovery.
goes_into_model_as: LoRA heal examples for code repair
